overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a player driving a convertible through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The vehicle navigates through downtown intersections, elevated highways, and covered underpasses with heavy neon signage and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown intersection with neon hotel signage

events.description: approaching intersection and stopping at red traffic light
traffic light turns green, vehicle begins moving through intersection

agents.ego_description: driving a convertible through downtown streets, stopping at red lights and proceeding through intersections

notable_agents.action: red car stopped at the traffic light ahead, then proceeding through intersection
dark colored sedan crossing the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large blue neon sign with Japanese characters reading HOテル on building facade
tall futuristic tower with red neon spiral lighting and circular platforms
multi-level highway structure with purple neon underlighting spanning across the road
suspended traffic signal showing red then green

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide downtown street at night, dominated by a neon hotel sign and a distinctive red spiral tower. The player drives toward an intersection, stopping at a red light as other vehicles cross. When the light turns green, the car proceeds through the intersection with moderate traffic flowing around.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway ramp with commercial buildings

events.description: turning left from main street onto elevated highway ramp
accelerating up the elevated ramp, gaining elevation above street level

agents.ego_description: turning left onto an elevated highway ramp and accelerating uphill

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead up the ramp, maintaining distance

entered.detail: yellow building with large red neon sign reading SHACK on the facade
teal and white building with green signage and Japanese text indicating 24-hour business
red and gray concrete dividers along the edge of the elevated ramp

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns left onto an elevated highway ramp, leaving the main intersection behind. A yellow building with a prominent red SHACK sign appears on the left, while a fast food restaurant with green neon signage lines the right. The car accelerates up the ramp, with concrete barriers now flanking the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with traffic congestion and vending stalls

events.description: coming to a complete stop behind traffic on the elevated highway
black van passes in the opposite direction on the left side

agents.ego_description: stopped in traffic on the elevated highway, waiting for the vehicle ahead to move

notable_agents.action: black sedan stopped directly ahead, brake lights illuminated
black van passing in the opposite lane, moving toward camera

entered.detail: small structure with illuminated advertisements and vending machines on the sidewalk
red metal guardrail along the right edge of the elevated roadway

segments.scene_description: Traffic comes to a standstill on the elevated highway. The player waits behind a black sedan, with a fast food building and vending booth now visible up close on the right. A black van passes in the opposite direction, and red guardrails line the edge of the elevated roadway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with overhead fluorescent lighting

events.description: entering covered underpass area with overhead lighting after descending from elevated highway
making a right turn while accelerating through the covered roadway
transitioning from neon exterior lighting to warm artificial overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: driving through a covered underpass, navigating a right turn while passing a pedestrian on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person walking along the sidewalk under the covered area

entered.detail: grid of yellow-green rectangular light panels illuminating the covered roadway from above
concrete covered roadway with walls and ceiling enclosing the street
raised pedestrian walkway with railing along the right side of the covered road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the elevated highway and enters a covered underpass with overhead fluorescent lighting. The environment shifts from open neon-lit streets to an enclosed concrete corridor with yellow-green ceiling lights. The car makes a right turn through the underpass, passing a pedestrian on the sidewalk before approaching another intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-drenched metropolis that transitions from open downtown streets to a confined concrete underpass. It begins on a wide city road dominated by a red spiral tower and a glowing hotel sign, pausing at a red light before proceeding through a busy intersection. As the vehicle turns left, the scene shifts onto an elevated highway ramp flanked by concrete barriers and bright commercial signage, including a red SHACK sign and green neon fast-food lights. The movement then slows to a standstill amidst highway traffic, where red guardrails and vending booths line the roadway before the car descends from the elevation. Finally, the environment closes in as the vehicle enters a covered underpass, shifting from the open night sky to an enclosed corridor of yellow-green fluorescent lighting before turning toward another intersection.
